entries.title: Block registry diagnostics output.
entries.notes: Optional because `capell-app/content-blocks` is a shared registry package. Requires a consuming package or harness that registers block definitions before diagnostics are meaningful.
entries.useCase: A package developer verifies which block definitions, renderers, fixtures, and builder blocks are registered.

entries.title: Filament builder block picker in a consuming package.
entries.notes: Optional and blocked until a consuming package such as Content Sections exposes registered `FilamentBuilderBlock` classes in a Builder field.
entries.useCase: An editor chooses a registered content block from a Filament Builder field supplied by a consuming package.

entries.title: Fallback block rendering state.
entries.notes: Capture only in a controlled fixture. Public output must not reveal internal block metadata, admin view names, or package implementation details.
entries.useCase: A developer confirms that an unknown or unrenderable block fails closed with safe public fallback output.
